channel.title: andeng.mariee TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from andeng.mariee

item.title: Hidden gem in Pampanga 💚
item.description: Hidden gem in Pampanga 💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: New year, same boomba moments with the Boomba Queen 🤭💚 I’ve been feeling sad lately, but I can keep smiling because of you all 🥹
item.description: New year, same boomba moments with the Boomba Queen 🤭💚 I’ve been feeling sad lately, but I can keep smiling because of you all 🥹
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Better late than never 😅 2025 was a big year for me. Thank you for being part of the journey. 💚
item.description: Better late than never 😅 2025 was a big year for me. Thank you for being part of the journey. 💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Another day another boomba. With love, boomba queen 💚 This may be my last few videos in Pampanga because I’m going back to Negros next week 🤭🥹
item.description: Another day another boomba. With love, boomba queen 💚 This may be my last few videos in Pampanga because I’m going back to Negros next week 🤭🥹
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: I am so excited to be apart of the 3rd Cadiz Dinagsa Fun Ride. I’m ready to “Ride As One” as they celebrate the 52nd Dinagsa Festival in Cadiz City 🤩 Thank you so much for inviting me as a guest rider Dinagsa Festival Fun Ride 2026 and Whales Motorcycle C
item.description: I am so excited to be apart of the 3rd Cadiz Dinagsa Fun Ride. I’m ready to “Ride As One” as they celebrate the 52nd Dinagsa Festival in Cadiz City 🤩 Thank you so much for inviting me as a guest rider Dinagsa Festival Fun Ride 2026 and Whales Motorcycle C
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: It’s music to my ears 🤭 So hard to resist when I’m inside the tunnels 😅
item.description: It’s music to my ears 🤭 So hard to resist when I’m inside the tunnels 😅
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Get ready and Gear up with me 💚 The journey from Pampanga to Negros begins! I hope to see you all along the way. Exploring the Philippines is more fun when I am feeling confident and safe wearing my gear. 1000+ kilometers noooo problem🤭 Riding pants : Ta
item.description: Get ready and Gear up with me 💚 The journey from Pampanga to Negros begins! I hope to see you all along the way. Exploring the Philippines is more fun when I am feeling confident and safe wearing my gear. 1000+ kilometers noooo problem🤭 Riding pants : Ta
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: After 475 Kilometers I made it here safely to Cadiz City!Thank you so much for the warm welcome. I’m looking forward to the Dinagsa Festival Fun Ride tomorrow morning! See you all there 💚
item.description: After 475 Kilometers I made it here safely to Cadiz City!Thank you so much for the warm welcome. I’m looking forward to the Dinagsa Festival Fun Ride tomorrow morning! See you all there 💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: CADIZ CITY 😍💚 You have stolen my heart. Thank you so much for having me. See you all again next week for the Dinagsa Festival.
item.description: CADIZ CITY 😍💚 You have stolen my heart. Thank you so much for having me. See you all again next week for the Dinagsa Festival.
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: NEGROS ISLAND 🥹💚 I met so many of you along the way from Cadiz to Dumaguete. My heart is so full. Did I pass your city idols? Where to next ?
item.description: NEGROS ISLAND 🥹💚 I met so many of you along the way from Cadiz to Dumaguete. My heart is so full. Did I pass your city idols? Where to next ?
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: In 2026, I’m choosing healthy relationships in every area of my life. 🥹💚
item.description: In 2026, I’m choosing healthy relationships in every area of my life. 🥹💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: I missed Sinulog this year, so I went to CADIZ CITY DINAGSA FIESTA! I’m so happy I was able to meet so many of you all. Here are the highlights of today, no special editing just raw footage of the incredible time I had. Thank you Cadiz for having me back,
item.description: I missed Sinulog this year, so I went to CADIZ CITY DINAGSA FIESTA! I’m so happy I was able to meet so many of you all. Here are the highlights of today, no special editing just raw footage of the incredible time I had. Thank you Cadiz for having me back,
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Just a few of my favorite moments coming home from Bacolod to Dumaguete. Thank you for the love and laughs from Negros Occidental to Oriental 💚
item.description: Just a few of my favorite moments coming home from Bacolod to Dumaguete. Thank you for the love and laughs from Negros Occidental to Oriental 💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Beach ride this weekend, I really needed some time to relax before my next ride to Mindanao! So nice to see you all in Dumaguete, Bacong and Dauin 💚 Cagayan De Oro , you’re up next ☺️💚
item.description: Beach ride this weekend, I really needed some time to relax before my next ride to Mindanao! So nice to see you all in Dumaguete, Bacong and Dauin 💚 Cagayan De Oro , you’re up next ☺️💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: February already… other couples Vs. me this Valentine’s Day 😅 But you know what, riding is my happy place☺️. Maybe this year I’m not looking for love, I’m looking for Neutral🏍️🤣💚
item.description: February already… other couples Vs. me this Valentine’s Day 😅 But you know what, riding is my happy place☺️. Maybe this year I’m not looking for love, I’m looking for Neutral🏍️🤣💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Good morning idols ! 💚 Negros Oriental & Occidental I’ll be passing out flowers this week for Valentine’s Day. Comment your place below if you want me to visit and give you one 🌹☺️
item.description: Good morning idols ! 💚 Negros Oriental & Occidental I’ll be passing out flowers this week for Valentine’s Day. Comment your place below if you want me to visit and give you one 🌹☺️
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Everybody was Kung Fu Fighting 🥋🥷 Dumaguete and Dauin last week 🤭💚
item.description: Everybody was Kung Fu Fighting 🥋🥷 Dumaguete and Dauin last week 🤭💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: This was the sweetest reaction 😆🌹 Trading roses for smiles this Valentines Day ☺️💚
item.description: This was the sweetest reaction 😆🌹 Trading roses for smiles this Valentines Day ☺️💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: The people of Negros Oriental are so beautiful and kind. Yes- I was giving out roses for Valentines, but I was the one to receive the most. Your smiles , kindness and love was the best gift I could have asked for. I was really not alone this Valentines be
item.description: The people of Negros Oriental are so beautiful and kind. Yes- I was giving out roses for Valentines, but I was the one to receive the most. Your smiles , kindness and love was the best gift I could have asked for. I was really not alone this Valentines be
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Even if Valentine’s Day is over.. will you be mine? 🥹🌹💚 #sleeptoken #ladyrider #kawasaki #motorcycle
item.description: Even if Valentine’s Day is over.. will you be mine? 🥹🌹💚 #sleeptoken #ladyrider #kawasaki #motorcycle
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Why are you running? Best boomba reactions 😅🤭💚
item.description: Why are you running? Best boomba reactions 😅🤭💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Next Chapter: Bacolod City 💚 Calling this place home for a few months. Thank you for such a warm welcome City of Smiles ☺️
item.description: Next Chapter: Bacolod City 💚 Calling this place home for a few months. Thank you for such a warm welcome City of Smiles ☺️
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Bacolod welcomed me with rain, I heard that’s a blessing 🙏🏽💚
item.description: Bacolod welcomed me with rain, I heard that’s a blessing 🙏🏽💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Goodmorning 💚
item.description: Goodmorning 💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: That moment when it starts to rain when riding motor 😅 I think this is the current breakdown of the languages I can speak : 85% English , 10%Bisaya, 7% Tagalog, 3% Hiligaynon . More practice needed haha 🤣@spicymiaph
item.description: That moment when it starts to rain when riding motor 😅 I think this is the current breakdown of the languages I can speak : 85% English , 10%Bisaya, 7% Tagalog, 3% Hiligaynon . More practice needed haha 🤣@spicymiaph
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Everyone’s timeline is different 💚 There’s no right or wrong. No early or late in life. All I know is I’m really enjoying this chapter so far… and I’m so happy you’re all a part of it 🥹💚
item.description: Everyone’s timeline is different 💚 There’s no right or wrong. No early or late in life. All I know is I’m really enjoying this chapter so far… and I’m so happy you’re all a part of it 🥹💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Throttle therapy makes all the problems go away 💚 Feeling great in my new helmet from @Gille Helmets PH
item.description: Throttle therapy makes all the problems go away 💚 Feeling great in my new helmet from @Gille Helmets PH
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: First Bacolod Motovlog 🥹💚 It’s really true, Bacolod is the City of Smiles ☺️
item.description: First Bacolod Motovlog 🥹💚 It’s really true, Bacolod is the City of Smiles ☺️
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Everyday is boomba day 😅😂 #ladyrider #Philippines #zx4rr #kawasaki #Ninja
item.description: Everyday is boomba day 😅😂 #ladyrider #Philippines #zx4rr #kawasaki #Ninja
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: I saw so many of you in Downtown Dumaguete today!! Dumaguete really is the City of Gentle People 🥹💚
item.description: I saw so many of you in Downtown Dumaguete today!! Dumaguete really is the City of Gentle People 🥹💚
item.author: andeng.mariee

item.title: Happy Valentines Dumaguete City 🌹Part 1 of giving out roses and receiving smiles in the City of Gentle People 🥹💚
